title: Plastic Curtain Hooks (Pack of 40) | Curtain Glider Hooks | Curtain Track Hooks | For Window Tracks, Showers & Doors | Strong, Sturdy and Smooth Sliding.
features: PACKET SIZE: 40 Pack of white curtain track gliders compatible with and suitable for Decorail / Integra Monorail curtain track
STRONG, DURABLE MATERIAL: The curtain track gliders are made from a heavy-duty, durable, solid plastic, strong & sturdy enough to bear the weight of your curtains

EASY TO INSTALL: These plastic curtain gliders are easy to install – they just clip straight onto your track. You can attach your curtains to the hook on the back of the glider or fix the curtain hook thru the eye of the glider
GLIDE SMOOTHLY: The curtain track gliders will glide smoothly and freely across the track. No snagging, no sticking and no effort when opening/closing your curtains
SIZE: Total Length 50mm; Total Width 20mm; Internal Length (Height of Track) 30mm; Internal Width 6mm
description: Product Description Enjoy the luxury of smooth and effortless curtain operation. Our gliders ensure a snag-free, stick-free experience, allowing you to open and close your curtains with ease. Crafted from heavy-duty, solid plastic, our curtain track gliders are built to last. Experience strength and sturdiness that effortlessly supports the weight of your curtains. Say goodbye to complicated installations. Our plastic curtain gliders clip seamlessly onto your track. Attach your curtains to the convenient hook on the back of the glider or thread the curtain hook through the eye of the glider for a hassle-free setup.
